address: 1842 East Susquehanna Avenue, Fishtown, Philadelphia PA 19125

rates.response_target: Same day for calls received before 14:00
Within 3 hours, subject to on-call crew availability
Within 1 hour for active water damage, within 2 hours otherwise

material_markup.customer_supplied_parts: No markup, no warranty on customer-supplied material

payment_terms.residential: Due on completion for jobs under $500. Net 15 for jobs $500 and above.
payment_terms.commercial: Net 30 with approved credit application on file.

notes: All rates exclude parts and permits. PA sales tax applies to parts only. Confirmation required for any job exceeding the $300 threshold. Zone surcharges apply per the service area zone schedule. Rates reviewed annually by Emily Porter and Kevin Koval at the January partner meeting.
